# Barter Trader

> An Android marketplace for exchanging items through barter.

## Overview

Barter Trader is an Android app where users trade items without currency. Providers offer items, Receivers browse and request exchanges. Built with Java 8, Firebase, Clean Architecture + MVVM.

## Key Files

- README.md: Project documentation and setup instructions
- AGENTS.md: AI agent context — architecture, patterns, conventions
- skills/conventions/SKILL.md: Coding conventions skill
- app/build.gradle: Dependencies and build config
- app/src/main/java/ca/dal/bartertrader/: Source root
- firebase.json: Firebase emulator configuration
- flake.nix: Nix development environment
